description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with two stories and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in light blue and beige panels, with wooden accents on the staircases and floor surfaces. The structure includes two prominent staircases connecting the ground, first, and second floors, both with open risers and a light wood finish. The building sits on a rectangular wooden platform that mimics a deck or patio, and the upper floor has a large cutout, possibly for a skylight or open terrace. The windows are minimal and not clearly defined, giving the building a contemporary, minimalist appearance. The overall form is geometric, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, light blue and beige paneling, and open wooden staircases, set on a rectangular wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two open wooden staircases, and the layered structure of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall, upper floor cutout, and the wooden platform extending behind the building.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid side wall, minimal window openings, and the layered flat roofs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at both staircases and the open central area between floors.
